name: Harden Zitadel Compose
description: Post-bootstrap hardening: Changes Zitadel command from start-from-init to start, sets bootstrap volume to read-only, removes FIRSTINSTANCE env vars, and empties admin PAT file. Only runs after successful bootstrap (requires zitadel_project_id output).

parameters.name: Zitadel Project ID
parameters.description: Output from bootstrap step (presence triggers hardening)

commands.name: Harden Zitadel Compose
commands.description: Modify deployed compose file for production security
